notes: Arturia ARP 2600 V is a faithful emulation of the classic ARP 2600 semi-modular synthesizer, combining pre-patched signal flow with a fully patchable matrix for deep customization. The instrument features three VCOs, a 4072-style 24dB/oct low-pass filter with a separate 20Hz high-pass filter, a built-in spring reverb, and a sample-and-hold circuit for generative patching. It excels at leads, bass, and experimental textures thanks to its rich filter character and flexible architecture. Filter cutoff and resonance are the primary real-time performance controls, while VCF envelope amount and LFO rate shape the movement of the sound.

Expression.description: Expression — scales output level for dynamics

Modulation.description: Modulation wheel — typically routed to VCF cutoff or VCO pitch

VCF Cutoff.description: VCF low-pass filter cutoff frequency — the primary timbral control

VCF Resonance.description: VCF resonance/Q — self-oscillates at maximum, giving the classic ARP scream

VCF Env Amount.description: Amount of ADSR envelope applied to VCF cutoff — positive values open the filter on attack

VCF HPF Cutoff.description: 20Hz high-pass filter cutoff — removes low-frequency rumble or thins the sound

Attack.description: ADSR envelope attack time — applies to both VCF and VCA

LFO Rate.description: LFO rate — controls speed of modulation assigned to pitch, filter, or PWM

LFO Depth.description: LFO depth — modulation amount applied to target parameter

VCO2 Frequency.description: VCO2 frequency — detune relative to VCO1 for chorus and beating effects

VCO3 Frequency.description: VCO3 frequency — can be used as an LFO or audio-rate source

Noise Level.description: White/pink noise mixer level — feeds into VCF for percussion and wind textures

Ring Mod Level.description: Ring modulator output level — metallic, bell-like tones from VCO1 x VCO2

Spring Reverb.description: Built-in spring reverb send level — the signature warm, coiling reverb of the ARP 2600

Macro 1.description: Adaptive Macro 1 — label and target change per preset

Macro 2.description: Adaptive Macro 2 — label and target change per preset

Macro 3.description: Adaptive Macro 3 — label and target change per preset

Macro 4.description: Adaptive Macro 4 — label and target change per preset

Macro 5.description: Adaptive Macro 5 — label and target change per preset
